title: Session 13 — The Final Stretch
bodyText:
# What happened
Brolin dreamed of a net-weaving figure of **Gond**: *"Good deeds done with ill intentions are no good deeds... we will help you this day — but for the last time."* He dismissed it.

Following the vines into a massive cavern, the party found a **severed, tattooed arm** — and Trunks' curled body, which rose and **transformed into a half-dwarf, half-shadow monstrosity**. The **horned figure** appeared, made Varen a final offer, was refused — battle. It tore the coverings from Varen's hand and named him **traitor**; Trunks flickered between self-control and attacking his friends. At the brink, **Trunks drank every vial at once**: an **anti-magic explosion** that disintegrated him and downed most of the party. Felson, choking on blood, took what seemed his last breath — and **Varen's divine magic rewrote the last moments**, bringing him back. The party defeated the horned figure; Varen **dismembered it with the shadowed sword** (Velmir).
